name: Chocolate Pie Filling
recipeIngredient: 4 cups skim milk - add 1 cup at a time
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients (sugar, cornstarch, and cocoa) in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the skim milk to the dry mixture, stirring continuously.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Microwave the mixture on intervals depending on your microwave's wattage, stirring between each interval until it thickens but remains pourable.
5. Pour the filling into your favorite crust and refrigerate with plastic wrap pressed onto the filling.
6. Serve with a topping of choice. This recipe makes about a 9-inch pie and can easily be adapted for larger plates.
